name: Besties / Forever | Avi-Mini
description:
ANOTHER ARIA-IRINA BOT REJOICE!!!

Announcement:

Hello!

I will be focusing on writing more serious plots in the near future.

So I decided to give my baby boys (Varkai and Healf) one last treat before I lock in.

Machi's Fyrm bot will arrive in the next fluff season.

That is all.

Mwuah mwuah ♥

Irrelevant Creator Notes:

We have a Discord Server now!

But first, setting expectations:

  1. We don't have plans to be a big community. JanAI already has larger Discord communities for people to hang out and interact with.

  2. Our Discord server only aims to be a quiet corner where people can reach out to me, or use my resources for writing.

  3. For upcoming bot creators who want to take inspiration from my style, and ask questions they are otherwise too shy to ask.

That is all!
